vrcPlus.title: VRC+ Media
vrcPlus.subtitle: Manage your prints, gallery, profile icons and inventory. Uploads and deletes hit VRChat directly.
vrcPlus.supporterRequired: This needs an active VRC+ subscription.
vrcPlus.limitReached: You've reached the VRC+ limit of {{limit}} for this slot.
vrcPlus.deletePrintBody: This permanently removes the print from your VRChat account. This cannot be undone.
vrcPlus.deleteImageBody: This permanently removes the image from your VRChat account. This cannot be undone.

emoji.explainer: Animated emoji are a vertical sprite sheet — stack each frame top-to-bottom in one square PNG, then set the frame count and playback speed.
emoji.badFrames: Frames and fps must both be at least 1.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: View and edit your VRChat profile
profile.switchAvatarHint: Head over to the Avatars page, select a model, and click Switch to this avatar to change it live. Requires a signed-in VRChat session.
profile.saveStatusPreset: Save current status as a preset
profile.noStatusPresets: Save a status + description combo to reuse it later.
profile.quickActionsDesc: Open the built-in VRCSM workspace for friends, avatars, worlds, and favorites without bouncing out to the VRChat website.
profile.liveContextDesc: Important ids and current session targets for quick navigation.
profile.liveContextHint: Use these live ids as anchors for the native friends, avatars, worlds, and favorites workflows inside VRCSM.

edit.noLinks: No links yet — click + Add link above

profile.linkedAccountsDesc: Bound platforms and identity fields from the VRChat login session, displayed natively.

screenshots.title: Screenshots
screenshots.subtitle: VRChat screenshot browser
screenshots.deletePartial: Some files could not be deleted
screenshots.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this screenshot?
screenshots.confirmDeleteBulk: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} screenshots?

avatars_extra.selectAvatarNeedsAuth: Please sign in to VRChat first

friendDetail.title: Friend Details
friendDetail.confidenceHint: Based on {{days}} days of observed online history
friendDetail.messagePlaceholder: Hi! Want to hop into a world?
friendDetail.messageHint: Ctrl+Enter to send. VRChat drops DMs from non-friends.
friendDetail.blockConfirmShort: Block {{name}}? They won't be able to interact with you.
friendDetail.notSignedIn: Sign in to VRChat to view friend details.
friendDetail.unfriendConfirm2: If you click the red button, {{name}} might be gone from here for good. QvQ
friendDetail.unfriendCancelled: Cancelled. Friendship stays tucked in safely.
friendDetail.boopHint: Pick a message type, then choose which saved snippet to attach. Configure up to 4 slots per type in the VRChat client (Quick Menu → Notifications → Messages).
friendDetail.boopSent: Boop sent — {{name}} will see a notification.
friendDetail.boopEmojiHint: Common VRChat boop emoji — click to copy, then paste into your saved-message slots
friendDetail.boopEmojiCopied: Copied! Paste it into a saved-message slot in the VRChat client.
friendDetail.boopInviteNeedsWorld: Invite messages need your own world location. Open the VRChat website to manage them.
friendDetail.boopSendTooltip: Send this message as a request-invite notification
friendDetail.boopCooldownTooltip: On cooldown — wait before sending again
friendDetail.boopInviteTypeHint: Invite and invite-response messages are used when inviting someone to your world. These previews are shown for reference — configure them in the VRChat client to use with the invite action.
friendDetail.noSlotsHint: VRChat lets you save up to 4 invite snippets per type. Configure them in the VRChat client under Quick Menu → Notifications → Messages, then they'll appear here to choose from.
friendDetail.editSlotsHint: Edit your saved snippets in the VRChat client (Quick Menu → Notifications → Messages).
friendDetail.notePlaceholder: Write a private note about this friend...

osc.title: OSC Tools
osc.subtitle: Send and receive Open Sound Control messages against VRChat. Out → :9000, In ← :9001 by default.

page.subtitle: Build VRChat OSC messages, preview exactly what gets sent, and watch the send/receive loop in one place.

profile.label: Profile
profile.deleteBody: "{{name}}" and its cards will be removed. This cannot be undone.

io.title: Import / Export profile
io.desc: Export copies the active profile's cards as JSON. Paste JSON and import to replace this profile's cards.

list.title: Messages
list.resetBody: This replaces the current profile's messages with the built-in defaults.
list.empty: No messages yet. Use "Add message" to start.

editor.empty: Select a message on the left, or add one to start editing.
editor.title: Edit message
editor.name: Name
editor.templatePlaceholder: Type text and insert {variables}. Example: CPU {cpu.loadPct} {cpu.tempC}
editor.rateHint: Chatbox limit: 5 manual sends per 5s; auto send throttles to one message every 2s.

loop.title: Send & receive
loop.idle: Send a message or start the listener.

avatar.title: Avatar parameters
avatar.hint: Reads a local avatar's OSC config and adds its parameters as value messages.
avatar.missing: Enter or pick an avatar id
avatar.noParams: No parameters in this avatar file.

osc.sendDesc: Fire a single OSC message. Use addresses like /avatar/parameters/Foo for avatar parameters or /chatbox/input for ChatBox.
osc.listenDesc: Bind a UDP socket and log every OSC message VRChat (or any sender) emits.

chatbox.title: Chatbox Quick Send
chatbox.desc: Send text to VRChat chatbox via OSC. Max 144 chars.
chatbox.rateLimit: Wait before sending another chatbox message
chatbox.rateLimitBurst: Chatbox allows 5 manual messages per 5 seconds. Wait {{seconds}}s.

studio.title: OSC Studio
studio.subtitle: Build OSC from draggable hardware cards, four presets, live preview, and controlled auto-send.
studio.avatarMissing: Select or enter an avatar id
studio.noPreview: Select a card to preview output.
studio.noAvatarParams: No parameters found in this local avatar file.
studio.dropHint: Type text here, or drag hardware cards from the right into this editor.
studio.dragComponent: Drag into the editor or click to insert
studio.emptyComposer: Drag component cards here or add custom text below.
studio.componentHint: Start with these stable cards. Temperature, fan and board cards appear in their own tabs because they depend on sensor providers.
studio.avatarParamsHint: Scans local avatar OSC config and turns parameters into control cards. It is not an avatar model unpacker.

auth.dialogBody: VRCSM calls the VRChat REST API directly with WinHTTP. Your credentials never leave this machine — only the session cookie is kept, DPAPI-encrypted.
auth.nativeLoginHint: VRCSM calls the VRChat REST API directly with WinHTTP. Your credentials never leave this machine — only the session cookie is kept, DPAPI-encrypted at %LocalAppData%\VRCSM\session.dat.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor verification
twoFactor.body: VRChat asked for a two-factor code. Enter the 6-digit token from your authenticator app or the email VRChat just sent.

vrchatWorkspace.title: VRChat Workspace
vrchatWorkspace.noSubscriptionSignals: No dedicated subscription fields were exposed by this session.
vrchatWorkspace.pickDownloadFolder: Choose a folder for avatar bundles
vrchatWorkspace.downloadAssetMissing: This avatar does not expose a downloadable Windows asset URL.
vrchatWorkspace.noJoinable: No joinable friends are currently exposing an instance.
vrchatWorkspace.groupsBody: Your VRChat groups from the signed-in session, surfaced natively inside the workspace.
vrchatWorkspace.noGroups: No groups were returned for this account.
vrchatWorkspace.blocksMutesBody: Current player moderation entries pulled from your signed-in VRChat session.
vrchatWorkspace.noModerations: No block or mute entries were returned for this account.
vrchatWorkspace.inventoryBody: Recent avatars seen across local cache, log parsing, and avatar history persisted by VRCSM.
vrchatWorkspace.noInventory: No persisted avatar history yet. Wear avatars or inspect them to let VRCSM build inventory.
vrchatWorkspace.downloadBody: Download recent avatar bundles directly from the signed-in VRChat session into a local folder you choose.
vrchatWorkspace.noDownloadCandidates: No recent avatars are available as download candidates yet.
vrchatWorkspace.marketplaceBody: Ownership and acquisition signals pulled from official favorites, local avatar inventory, recent bundle targets, and any commerce-related fields exposed by the active VRChat session.
vrchatWorkspace.noMarketplaceSignals: No local ownership signals yet. Favorite, inspect, or download avatars to let VRCSM build this surface.
vrchatWorkspace.accountLinkBody: Linked platform and identity fields resolved from the signed-in VRChat session, surfaced locally without bouncing out to the web panel.
vrchatWorkspace.subscriptionsBody: Supporter and subscription state inferred from the authenticated user payload plus local VRChat settings signals stored on this machine.
vrchatWorkspace.notOwnedAvatar: This avatar isn't yours — VRChat doesn't provide a download for it.
vrchatWorkspace.avatarHistoryDesc: Recently worn avatars extracted from parsed VRChat logs.
vrchatWorkspace.avatarDownloadsDesc: Download the avatar .vrca asset bundle to a local folder. Sign-in required.
vrchatWorkspace.signInRequired: Sign in to download avatar asset bundles.
vrchatWorkspace.avatarDetailsFailed: Could not fetch avatar details. It may be private or deleted.
vrchatWorkspace.noAssetUrl: No downloadable asset URL found for this avatar.
vrchatWorkspace.noFavoriteWorlds: No favorite worlds yet. Sync your VRChat favorites to see them here.
vrchatWorkspace.noRecentWorlds: No recent worlds found in VRChat logs.

friends.title: Friends
friends.subtitle: Live VRChat friend roster — requires sign-in.
friends.filterPlaceholder: Filter by name, trust rank, world, or ID…
friends.signInRequiredBody: Friend list, presence, and location all come from the VRChat API. VRCSM opens VRChat's own login page in a secure browser window and only stores the resulting session cookie — DPAPI-encrypted, never the password.

actions.selfInviteSent: Requested an invite to {{name}}'s current instance

inspector.empty: Select a friend to see their location, avatar and quick actions.
inspector.title: Friend at a glance

wear.notCloneable: This avatar does not allow cloning. No public alternatives found.
wear.altDesc: The original avatar isn't cloneable. Pick a public alternative below.

groups.subtitle: Every VRChat group you belong to — sorted by your representative first, then by online activity.
groups.empty: You haven't joined any VRChat groups yet.

update.title: VRCSM Update
update.availableDesc: A newer VRCSM is available. Install now or stay on the current version.
update.readyDesc: The installer is downloaded and verified. Click Install to apply — VRCSM will restart.
update.downloadingDesc: Downloading — do not close VRCSM until this completes.
update.errorDesc: Could not check for updates right now.

radar.title: Live Instance Radar
radar.subtitle: Unified live instance radar and session history workspace
radar.trackingWait: Tracking will populate as players join...
radar.idUnknown: ID unknown, cannot load profile details

recentHistory.title: Recent Session History
recentHistory.desc: Pulled from the persistent player event database.

radar.vrcNotRunningHint: Start VRChat to monitor rooms and players in real time

analysis.sessionsDesc: Reconstructed from local logs — newest first.
analysis.empty: No sessions found in local logs.
analysis.loginRequired: Login required to scan local logs for session history.

radar.noPlayerEvents: No player events recorded yet. Launch VRChat and join a world.
radar.wearNotAllowed: This avatar does not allow cloning.
radar.wearNotFound: Could not find this avatar. It may be private.

folderPicker.title: Choose a folder
folderPicker.hint: Navigate into a folder, then click Choose this folder.

about.title: About VRCSM
about.subtitle: VRChat Settings Manager
about.body: VRCSM is maintained as a local-first VRChat workspace with native tooling, cache controls, and session utilities in one desktop app.
about.developerBody: Solo dev, coffee in hand — the native host, the UI, and the packaging all live in one little codebase. Hope it makes your VRChat life comfier (｡•ㅅ•｡)♡
about.footer: Built for local-first VRChat account, cache, and session management.

cmd.title: Command Palette
cmd.placeholder: Type a command or search logs, players, worlds…

dock.hideNoiseHint: Fold VRChat's EOS/Stomp telemetry retry spam (not a VRCSM error).

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.brokenDesc: These categories point at missing targets — click Repair to recreate the junction.
dashboard.brokenRepairHint: Repair will recreate the missing target folder and restore the NTFS junction.
dashboard.recentActivityDesc: World joins, player events, and avatar switches

bundles.title: Bundles
bundles.subtitle: UnityFS asset bundles cached by VRChat.
bundles.deleteConfirmWarning: This will permanently remove {{count}} file(s) (~{{size}}) from your VRChat cache. This cannot be undone.
bundles.deleteNothingToDo: Nothing to delete — this bundle may be a preserved system entry.
bundles.local3dPreviewHint: Uses the cached __data bundle directly. This does not require an avatar ID; encrypted or non-avatar bundles may still fail to render.

library.title: Library
library.subtitle: A unified local shelf for worlds, avatars, and future tagged collections.
library.searchPlaceholder: Filter by name, id, tag, or note…
library.editBody: Update local tags and notes for {{name}}.
library.notePlaceholder: What is this good for, what mood does it fit, or why did you save it?
library.tagsHint: Use commas or new lines to separate tags.
library.emptyBody: Save avatars and worlds from their base lists first. This page becomes the shared local shelf other features can build on.
library.noMatch: No items match the current filter
library.noMatchBody: Try clearing the type chip or search query.
library.officialSyncSuccessGrouped: Synced {{count}} favorites into {{lists}} groups ({{avatars}} avatars, {{worlds}} worlds)

modelDb.title: Model Database
modelDb.subtitle: Manage the avatars your account owns: rename, edit visibility, swap the image, or delete.
modelDb.replaceImageConfirmBody: Upload a new image for "{{name}}" and re-point it on your live VRChat account. The avatar's public thumbnail changes immediately.
modelDb.deleteConfirmBody: Permanently delete "{{name}}"? VRChat hides the avatar, removes its asset files, and reserves the id forever. This cannot be undone.

hidden.explainer: VRChat can't list hidden (deleted) avatars. Look them up by id instead — scan ids seen in your local logs, or paste a specific avtr_ id. Only avatars you own will resolve.
hidden.notHidden: That avatar exists but isn't hidden.
hidden.notOwned: Couldn't resolve that id — VRChat only returns avatars you own.
hidden.noHistory: No avatar ids in local history yet. Play VRChat to populate it, or paste an id above.

harvest.empty: No avatar ids found in the local analytics cache (or VRChat hasn't written one yet).
harvest.found: Found {{total}} avatar id(s) locally · {{fresh}} not in your owned list.
harvest.tooltip: Read-only scan of VRChat's local analytics cache for avatar ids (experimental).

avatars.title: Avatars
avatars.subtitle: LocalAvatarData entries, with names pulled from output logs.

preview3d.controlsBody: LMB rotate · Shift+LMB pan · wheel zoom · RMB pan
preview3d.textureNote: The current extractor keeps mesh and UV data only; embedded textures are not exported to the GLB yet.
preview3d.expandedBody: Use the larger viewport to inspect silhouette, bones, and materials. Shift plus left drag pans, right drag also pans, and middle-click is disabled to avoid WebView glitches.

avatars.thumbnailNote: VRChat's avatar API refuses anonymous requests — even for public avatars — so VRCSM renders a stable, id-seeded cube instead of a real thumbnail. Worlds use the public endpoint and show real images.
avatars.includeLogOnlyHint: Show avatars that only appear in your VRChat output log, including avatars seen on other players.
avatars.nameNote: Avatar names are extracted from the VRChat output logs. Names only appear for avatars that have been loaded at least once on this machine.
avatars.encounterLogNote: This row is indexed from local VRChat logs. The log exposes avatar name and wearer, but not avtr_* or the official thumbnail URL. VRCSM first tries verified public avatar matches; if that fails, it may show the wearer's current avatar image as a reference, which may not be the avatar seen at that time.
avatars.profileFallbackNote: No trusted thumbnail was found, so VRCSM is showing the wearer's current profile image as a reference for {{name}}.
avatars.profileFallbackUnavailable: Could not load the wearer profile. The user may be ambiguous, unavailable, or the VRChat API did not return it.
avatars.seenThumbnailHow: Seen-avatar thumbnails appear when the log has a real avtr_* id, public search finds an exact name/author match, or the wearer's current public avatar image is available. Items marked Reference are current wearer images and may not be the exact avatar seen then.
avatars.previewWorkbench: The inspector preview is now intentionally compact, and the top-right expand button opens a larger centered viewer. The current extractor still does not embed textures into the GLB, so Original mode can only show the raw exported material state for now; scroll to zoom, hold Shift and drag to pan, and right drag also pans.
avatars.referenceImageHint: Wearer's current avatar/profile picture — not a verified historical match.
avatars.referenceImageVerifiedHint: Wearer's current avatar matches the logged name.

worlds.title: Worlds
worlds.subtitle: Recent worlds parsed from VRChat output logs.
worlds.empty: No recent worlds found in logs.

logs.title: Logs
logs.subtitle: Parsed from {{count}} VRChat output_log_*.txt
logs.playerEventsDesc: OnPlayerJoined / OnPlayerLeft across all logs (capped at 500)
logs.screenshotsDesc: [VRC Camera] Took screenshot to: paths (capped at 500)
logs.clearFilesSkippedActive: Kept {{count}} active log file because VRChat is running.
logs.clearFilesConfirm: Delete stored VRChat output_log files? If VRChat is running, the current active log will be kept.

migrate.title: Migrate
migrate.subtitle: Move a cache directory to another drive and replace it with a junction.
migrate.selectCategoryDesc: Select which VRChat cache directory to migrate to another drive.
migrate.noCategories: Scanning... no migratable categories found yet.
migrate.pathConfigDesc: Source is the current cache location. Pick or type a target on another drive.
migrate.advancedHint: The migration pipeline runs: preflight check, file copy, hash verification, source removal, and NTFS junction creation. All phases are mandatory for data safety.
migrate.preflightResultsDesc: Disk space, blocker checks, and migration readiness.
migrate.vrcRunningBlocker: VRChat is running. Close it before migrating to avoid data corruption.
migrate.junctionStateDesc: The source path is already an NTFS junction. You can repair it if the target is missing or broken.

feed.title: Activity Feed
feed.subtitle: Unified, persistent timeline of friend presence, sessions and avatar changes.
feed.muteHint: Right-click to hide from the All view
feed.loginRequired: Log in to VRChat via the Settings page to view your activity feed.
feed.empty: No activity yet. Events appear here as your friends come online and move between instances.

gameLog.title: Game Log
gameLog.subtitle: Live raw VRChat output log tail.
gameLog.paused: Stream paused. Resume to capture new lines.
gameLog.waiting: Waiting for VRChat log output… launch VRChat to see live lines.
gameLog.hideNoiseHint: Fold VRChat's EOS/Stomp telemetry retry spam (not a VRCSM error).

friendLog.subtitle: Session encounter history and social change records kept in the local database.
friendLog.searchPlaceholder: Search by player, user id, world id, or event...

session.title: Session Event Feed
session.desc: Joined and left events captured from your local session history.

social.title: Friend Change Feed
social.desc: Longer-lived social deltas tracked in the local database. Records are written when a friend changes status / avatar / display name, or when you add/remove a friend. Requires VRChat session + Pipeline (WebSocket) connected.
social.empty:
No friend change records yet.

What triggers a row here:
• You're signed into VRChat and the Pipeline is connected (see the chip next to your name top-right)
• A friend changes their avatar, status, or display name
• You add or remove a friend

On a fresh install nothing appears until at least one friend event occurs.

note.placeholder: Add a personal note for this player...

friendLog.clearHistorySuccess: History cleared. Friend notes were kept.
friendLog.clearHistoryConfirm: Clear stored session history and social change history? Friend notes will be kept.
friendLog.loginRequired: Log in to VRChat via the Settings page to view friend activity history.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure VRCSM and the underlying VRChat options.

discord.title: Discord Rich Presence
discord.desc: Show your current VRChat world and player count in your Discord status. Register a Discord app at discord.com/developers/applications and paste its Application ID below.

enabled.label: Enable Rich Presence
enabled.desc: Push activity to Discord whenever the VRChat instance changes.

clientId.label: Application ID
clientId.desc: The 18-19 digit snowflake from your Discord developer dashboard.

notify.title: Desktop Notifications
notify.desc: Show native Windows notifications for live VRChat events while VRCSM is running. Each type is off by default.

friendOnline.label: Friend Comes Online
friendOnline.desc: Toast when a friend logs in to VRChat.

invite.label: Invites
invite.desc: Toast when you receive an instance invite.

friendRequest.label: Friend Requests
friendRequest.desc: Toast when someone sends you a friend request.

vrOverlay.label: Show in VR Headset
vrOverlay.desc: Also mirror the enabled notifications above into your headset via XSOverlay. Requires XSOverlay running.

tts.label: Speak Notifications
tts.desc: Read live events aloud via your system voice while you're in VR.
tts.unsupported: Speech synthesis isn't available in this runtime.

ttsScope.label: What to Speak
ttsScope.desc: Friends only announces friends coming online; All also speaks invites and friend requests.

screenshots.title: Screenshot metadata
screenshots.desc: Auto-tag new VRChat captures with the world ID, instance, and player list at the moment of capture. Tags survive in the PNG and are readable by exiftool / VRCX.

autoInject.label: Inject metadata on new captures
autoInject.desc: Watches %USERPROFILE%\Pictures\VRChat. Inject is best-effort — radar must be attached to capture players.

app.factoryResetHint: Wipe VRCSM's saved session, thumbnail cache and logs. Does NOT touch VRChat's own data.
app.factoryResetConfirmBody: This wipes VRCSM's saved VRChat session, thumbnail cache and logs under %LocalAppData%\VRCSM. VRChat's own avatars, cache and registry settings are NOT affected. This action cannot be undone.
app.factoryResetOkToast: VRCSM has been reset. It will restart automatically.
app.clearVrcCacheHint: Selectively wipe VRChat caches like Avatars, Worlds, and Textures.
app.clearCacheBody: Select which VRChat cache categories you want to safely wipe. Useful if the cache is taking up a massive amount of space or you want a fresh start.

cacheWindowsPlayer.name: Avatars & Worlds (Cache-WindowsPlayer)
cacheWindowsPlayer.desc: Main VRChat cache folder taking up the most space.

textureCache.name: Texture Cache
textureCache.desc: Cached textures for avatars and worlds.

localPlayerModerations.name: Local Moderations
localPlayerModerations.desc: Local instance mutes, blocks, and show-avatar toggles.

social.sectionDesc: Configure live tracker and background polling for your friend list.
social.liveRefreshHint: Automatically query VRChat servers in the background to detect when friends come online or switch instances.
social.refreshIntervalHint: How often the background tracker refreshes data. Lower values update faster but may trigger VRChat API rate limits (429).

vrc.sectionDesc: Live values from HKCU\Software\VRChat\VRChat. Writes are blocked while VRChat is running because the game overwrites the registry on exit.
vrc.filterPlaceholder: Filter by key, label, or value…
vrc.empty: No VRChat settings found in registry.
vrc.vrcRunningLock: VRChat is running — close it to enable edits
vrc.inspectorHint: Pick a key to view its registry encoding.

general.layoutDesc: Control which side panels stay visible by default across the app.
general.worldInspectorHint: Keep the resizable world inspector open beside the map list.
general.profileContextHint: Show the right-side live avatar and world context on My Profile.
general.radarTimelineHint: Keep the live timeline dock visible on Radar & Log.
general.friendsDetailHint: Show the right-side profile detail pane on the Friends page.
general.vrchatSidebarHint: When disabled, the right column folds below the main VRChat workspace instead of staying side-by-side.
general.showInstanceIdHint: When off, the instance number is hidden from friend locations. World, type and region still show.
general.hideUnfriendsHint: Hide "removed you" / unfriend rows from the friend activity log. Other events still show.
general.statusShapesHint: Add a distinct shape to each status indicator (join me, active, ask me, busy, offline) so they're distinguishable without relying on color.
general.userColorHint: Tint each user's name with a stable, unique color derived from their ID, making people easier to recognize at a glance across feeds and rosters.
general.runtimeDesc: Heuristic environment summary parsed from VRChat logs on this machine.

configJson.title: App Config (config.json)
configJson.description: Core Engine parameters located in AppData/LocalLow. Make sure to Save changes.

cacheDirectory.label: Cache Directory
cacheDirectory.hint: Absolute path to Custom Cache directory

cacheSize.label: Cache Size (GB)
cacheSize.hint: Maximum size of VRChat cache in gigabytes

customLoadScreenLogo.label: Custom Loading Screen Logo
customLoadScreenLogo.hint: Absolute Path to a custom PNG logo for the loading screen

fpsLimitDesktop.label: FPS Limit (Desktop)
fpsLimitDesktop.hint: Maximum framerate in Desktop mode (0 = unlimited)

fpsLimitVr.label: FPS Limit (VR)
fpsLimitVr.hint: Maximum framerate in VR mode (0 = unlimited)

desktopReticle.label: Desktop Reticle
desktopReticle.hint: Show center dot crosshair in Desktop mode

ignoreParticles.label: Ignore Particles
ignoreParticles.hint: Dramatically improves performance in crowded worlds

steamvr.title: VR Streaming Settings (SteamVR / Steam Link)
steamvr.presetQuest3Hint: Tuned for Quest 3 via Steam Link

questSection.title: Quest troubleshooting
questSection.body: Edge jitter, blurriness or black-screen stalls on Quest are almost always runtime-layer (Steam Link / Virtual Desktop / Oculus Link), not VRChat itself. Try the Quest 3 Optimized preset above, lower Encoder Resolution if jitter persists, disable Space Warp / Motion Smoothing if double-image ghosting shows up, and confirm Windows GPU Scheduling is on.

targetBandwidth.label: Target Bandwidth (Mbps)
targetBandwidth.hint: Bitrate limit for Steam Link. Up to 150-200 for good routers.

automaticBandwidth.label: Automatic Bandwidth
automaticBandwidth.hint: Let SteamVR dynamically drop bitrate on poor signal.

supersampleScale.label: Supersampling Scale
supersampleScale.hint: Render scale (1.0 = native, 1.5 = high clarity, requires good GPU)

supersampleManualOverride.label: Supersample Manual Override
supersampleManualOverride.hint: Forces custom scale instead of auto-adjusting.

refreshRate.label: Refresh Rate (Hz)
refreshRate.hint: Must match the headset's allowed refresh rates (72, 80, 90, 120)

motionSmoothing.label: Motion Smoothing
motionSmoothing.hint: Synthesizes frames on lag. Good for poor frametimes, but can cause ghosting artifacts.

supersampleFiltering.label: Supersample Filtering
supersampleFiltering.hint: Reduces aliasing at the cost of slight blur

linkRepair.title: Steam Link / Quest connection repair
linkRepair.body: Diagnose VRLink session ID mismatches, WirelessHmdNotConnected, stale Quest pairing caches, SteamVR Beta markers and unfinished SteamVR updates. Repairs back up first and default to a dry-run preview.
linkRepair.confirm: This will close Steam/SteamVR, back up SteamVR settings, appmanifest and localconfig.vdf, clear the Steam Link pairing cache, remove SteamVR Beta markers, and open Steam validation. Continue?
linkRepair.confirmPlan: Apply "{{name}}"? VRCSM backs up first and reports any write failures.
linkRepair.dryRunDone: Preview complete. Review the planned repair steps.
linkRepair.repairDone: Repair applied and Steam validation opened.
linkRepair.confirmDialogDesc: Review the specific files and actions listed below first. Nothing is modified until you click "Apply".
linkRepair.restoreDialogDesc: VRCSM closes Steam/SteamVR, backs up the current files first, then restores the backup you select.
linkRepair.noEvidence: No matching lines in the scanned log tail.
linkRepair.currentBackupDir: Backup of current files before restore
linkRepair.backupsHint: Restorable backups created by VRCSM are listed here. Restoring backs up the current files first.

summary.vrlinkSessionMismatch: VRLink session mismatch: Quest packets reached the PC, but SteamVR rejected the wireless headset session.
summary.betaMarkers: SteamVR Beta or user-level Beta markers detected; this may pin SteamVR to a problematic VRLink build.
summary.readyNoInvalid: SteamVR Ready appears in the recent logs and there is no invalid-session burst in the scanned range.
summary.lostMaster: SteamVR closed because the master process was lost; check VRLink pairing and runtime process stability.
summary.pairingRecords: Steam Link / Quest pairing records detected; old records can be safely reset after backup.
summary.noSignature: No clear VRLink failure signature in the scanned SteamVR logs.

recommendations.resetPairing: Reset the Steam Link / Quest pairing cache, then re-pair from the headset.
recommendations.removeManifestBeta: Remove the SteamVR BetaKey and validate AppID 250820 to return to the stable branch.
recommendations.removeUserBeta: Remove user-level 250820-beta / BetaKey markers from Steam localconfig.vdf.
recommendations.removeQuestDevices: Back up localconfig.vdf first, then remove old Oculus Quest / Steam Link streaming device records.
recommendations.finishUpdate: Let Steam finish the SteamVR update/validation, then retry Steam Link.
recommendations.retryThenDryRun: Retry from the headset first; if it fails, run the preview repair and compare the new log tail.

steamvr_missing.title: SteamVR or runtime directory not found
steamvr_missing.detail: Steam Link VR requires AppID 250820. Install SteamVR first, then run validation.

steamvr_pending_update.title: SteamVR has a pending update or unfinished download
steamvr_pending_update.detail: When SteamVR is mid manifest switch/download, Steam Link may fail to connect. Let Steam finish updating, then re-pair.

vrlink_session_mismatch.title: VRLink session ID mismatch
vrlink_session_mismatch.detail: Found {{count}} invalid session packets while SteamVR reports the wireless headset is not connected.

vrlink_invalid_session.title: Invalid VRLink session packets found
vrlink_invalid_session.detail: The scanned SteamVR log tail contains {{count}} invalid-session packets.

steamvr_unknown_shutdown.title: SteamVR closed for an unknown master-process reason
steamvr_unknown_shutdown.detail: This is usually tied to a VRLink handshake failure. Reset pairing first, then retry from the headset.

quest_pairing_cache.title: Quest / Steam Link pairing cache detected
quest_pairing_cache.detail: Found {{count}} Quest pairing markers in Steam localconfig.vdf.

steamvr_beta_marker.title: SteamVR Beta markers detected
steamvr_beta_marker.detail: BetaKey, 250820-beta or encoded Beta markers can pin SteamVR to a VRLink build with broken pairing state.

no_physical_ipv4_adapter.title: No active physical IPv4 network adapter detected
no_physical_ipv4_adapter.detail: Steam Link works best with the PC on wired Ethernet and the headset on the same router.

virtual_network_adapter.title: Virtual network adapter is enabled
virtual_network_adapter.detail: Detected {{count}} active virtual network adapters. VRCSM won't change them automatically; if pairing keeps failing, temporarily disable VPN / Hyper-V.

high_bandwidth.title: Steam Link bandwidth set high
high_bandwidth.detail: {{bandwidth}} Mbps may be too aggressive for shared Wi-Fi. When troubleshooting, start with 80-120 Mbps.

overscaled_low_vram.title: Supersampling high on low-VRAM GPU
overscaled_low_vram.detail: Lower supersampling to 0.8-1.0 while validating the link; raise it once the connection is stable.

no_blocker_found.title: No clear signature blocking Steam Link
no_blocker_found.detail: No Beta, pending update or invalid-session burst in the scanned tail. Retry from the headset, and rerun diagnosis immediately if it fails.

quest-link-backup.title: Back up current Quest Link settings
quest-link-backup.description: Create restorable snapshots of SteamVR, VRLink, Quest pairing and the SteamVR manifest only, without changing any settings.

pairing-reset.title: Reset pairing
pairing-reset.description: Clear account-level Quest / Steam Link pairing records and the SteamVR web cache, then let the headset re-pair cleanly.

full-vrlink-reset.title: Full VRLink reset
full-vrlink-reset.description: The full path that has fixed Quest 3 sessions before: pairing cache, SteamVR local runtime state, VRLink config folder, old logs, Beta markers, and Steam validation.

stable-validate.title: Stable branch validation
stable-validate.description: Remove only the SteamVR Beta markers and open Steam validation for AppID 250820.

safe-streaming.title: Safe streaming settings
safe-streaming.description: Write conservative Quest-safe Steam Link settings without clearing pairing data.

low-stability.title: Low-performance stability
low-stability.note: Use when the connection succeeds but stutters, blurs or goes black.

balanced-stable.title: Balanced stability
balanced-stable.note: Default recommendation for Quest 2/3 on typical Wi-Fi 5/6 routers.

quest3-clarity.title: Quest 3 clarity
quest3-clarity.note: Raise visual quality only after pairing/session is stable.

repairActions.removeQuestBlocks: Remove Quest / Steam Link streaming device blocks from file: {{path}}
repairActions.applySafeStreaming: Apply safe Quest streaming settings: 80 Mbps auto bandwidth, 1.0x supersampling, 72 Hz, motion smoothing off
repairActions.openValidateAfter: After repair, open steam://validate/250820 to validate

linkRepair.backupPartial: Quest Link backup completed with warnings: {{msg}}

steamvr.configNotFoundBody: VRCSM could not read SteamVR's settings file. Diagnostics and backup-first repair remain available; the parameter editor is disabled until SteamVR creates the file.
steamvr.editorUnavailable: SteamVR configuration editor unavailable: steamvr.vrsettings is not installed or has not been created yet.

effectiveResolution.hint: The Encoder Resolution shown by Steam Link is this value. Changing any field back-computes the Supersampling Scale (0.5–2.0, step 0.1).
effectiveResolution.label: Effective render resolution (per eye)

steamvr.profileApplied: Applied {{name}} — click Save Settings to persist.

experimental.heading: Experimental Features
experimental.blurb: These features are in active development. Expect rough edges, unexpected resource usage, and occasional breakage. They can be turned off anytime — state persists locally.

avatarVisualSearch.name: Visual Avatar Search
avatarVisualSearch.description: Find avatars visually similar to an image using a local AI model. Adds a 'Find Similar' right-click action on avatar cards.
avatarVisualSearch.warning: First use downloads a ~150 MB CLIP model. All processing runs locally; nothing is uploaded. Indexing a large cache can take several minutes and is CPU-intensive without WebGPU.

amplitudeHarvest.name: Amplitude Avatar-ID Harvest
amplitudeHarvest.description: Reads avatar ids (avtr_...) out of VRChat's own local Amplitude analytics cache to enrich the Model Database with avatars you've encountered. Read-only: nothing is written, deleted, or uploaded. Adds a 'Scan local cache' action on the Model Database page.
amplitudeHarvest.warning: Reading VRChat's analytics cache may be considered against VRChat's Terms of Service / data-use guidelines. Use at your own risk. This stays strictly local and read-only — only avtr_ ids are extracted, no other analytics data is surfaced or sent anywhere.

visualSearch.title: Visual Avatar Search
visualSearch.noResults: No results yet. If the index is empty, go to Settings → Experimental → "Rebuild Index" first.

vrDiag.heading: VR Diagnostics
vrDiag.blurb: Scans network adapters, SteamVR settings, audio routing, and vrlink connection status.
vrDiag.switchToSteamSpeakers: Switch playback to Steam Streaming Speakers
vrDiag.linkRepairReady: Steam Link repair panel ready. Invalid sessions: {{invalid}}, Quest pairing records: {{questPairs}}.
vrDiag.virtualAdapterWarning: Virtual adapter "{{name}}" ({{description}}) is enabled with IP {{ip}} and may interfere with VR streaming.

autoStart.label: Launch with Windows
autoStart.hint: Start VRCSM automatically when you log in to Windows.

data.heading: Data Management
data.blurb: Review and clear the caches and data VRCSM stores on this machine. Rebuildable caches are safe to clear; history and asset data are removed permanently.
data.confirmIrreversible: The following items will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
data.confirmSafe: The following items will be cleared. Caches regenerate automatically.
data.dangerAck: I understand this permanently deletes my own assets (favorites, notes, tags).

group.cacheDesc: Safe to clear. VRCSM regenerates these automatically as needed.
group.historyDesc: Locally recorded activity. Clearing is permanent and cannot be undone.
group.dangerDesc: Your own assets. Clearing permanently deletes favorites, notes and tags.

hardware.subtitle: Detect GPU and CPU to compute recommended VRChat settings for Steam Link / Quest.
hardware.title: Hardware & GPU

calendar.groupsSignIn: Sign in to VRChat to see events from groups you've joined.
calendar.noGroups: You haven't joined any VRChat groups yet.
calendar.noGroupEvents: Your {{count}} group(s) have no public events right now.

worldHistory.title: World History
worldHistory.subtitle: Last 100 visits · logged by the VRChat output-log tailer
worldHistory.empty: No world visits recorded yet. Launch VRChat and join a world — VRCSM will capture the visit from the game log.
worldHistory.rejoinHint: Launch VRChat into this exact instance

heatmap.title: Activity heatmap
heatmap.subtitle: When you join worlds, by weekday and hour (last {{days}} days)
heatmap.empty: Not enough visit history yet to chart an activity pattern.

worldHistory.clearDesc: This permanently deletes all logged world visits. This cannot be undone.
worldHistory.noPlayerCountHint: No local player join/leave events were recorded in this visit window.
worldHistory.playerCountHint: {{count}} local player log events in this visit window.

profileCard.wearFailed: Failed to wear avatar. This avatar may not be public or available.

market.title: Plugin Market
market.subtitle: Install official and community plugins served from the VRCSM feed.
market.fetchErrorHint: The remote store feed dwgx.github.io/VRCSM/plugins.json is temporarily unreachable. The Hello Plugin and VRChat Auto-Uploader bundled with VRCSM are already installed and can be opened from the sidebar; only installing new third-party plugins is affected.

detail.notFound: Plugin not found in the feed.
detail.bundledHint: Bundled plugins ship with VRCSM — disable instead of uninstalling.

install.title: Install Plugin
install.confirm: You are about to install "{{name}}". Please review the permissions before proceeding.

installed.title: Installed plugins
installed.subtitle: Manage locally-installed plugins and their state.

host.noPanel: Plugin {{id}} does not expose a panel UI.

eventRecorder.title: Event Recorder
eventRecorder.guide1: Records who you meet in VRChat instances in real-time.
eventRecorder.guide2: 1. Enter a name and click Start Recording. 2. While recording, players joining your instance are automatically logged. 3. Click Stop to end the session. Select a recording to see attendees.
eventRecorder.noRecordings: No recordings yet. Start one above to track who joins your instance.
eventRecorder.deleteDesc: This permanently removes "{{name}}" and its {{count}} attendee record(s). This cannot be undone.

socialGraph.title: Social Analytics
socialGraph.noEncounters: No encounter data yet. Player encounters are logged from VRChat output logs.
socialGraph.guide: Aggregates world visits and player encounters from your VRChat log history. Data accumulates as VRCSM parses logs — keep the app running while you play to build up analytics.
socialGraph.noWorlds: No visit data yet. World history is recorded when VRCSM parses your VRChat logs.
socialGraph.selfFiltered: Your own player id is excluded from encounter rankings.
socialGraph.lazyWorlds: World badges and thumbnails are loaded only when visible or opened.
socialGraph.graphGuide: Players who shared your instances, linked by overlapping time. Solid lines are confirmed (logged from your own instance); dashed lines are inferred co-presence between others — not confirmed friendships.
socialGraph.graphEmpty: No co-presence data yet. Edges appear once VRCSM has logged players sharing your instances.
socialGraph.clearDesc: This permanently deletes logged player encounters used for friend rankings and the co-presence graph. World-visit rankings are cleared separately on the World History page. This cannot be undone.

benchmark.title: Avatar Performance Benchmark
benchmark.desc: Estimates VRChat performance rank based on synced parameter count from LocalAvatarData. Lower parameter count = better network performance.
benchmark.empty: No avatar parameter data found. Run a cache scan from Dashboard first, then revisit this page.
benchmark.noSeen: No avatars recorded yet. VRCSM records avatars seen on other players from VRChat logs and friend activity.
benchmark.localEncounterIndexHint: Built from local VRChat logs. VRCSM now prefers saved thumbnails and real avatar ids; rows without ids resolve through exact public search when signed in, and ambiguous/private rows keep a stable placeholder.
benchmark.referenceImageHint: This image is the wearer's current avatar/profile picture, not a verified historical match.
benchmark.clearBenchmarkDesc: This deletes persisted benchmark snapshots. Avatars still in the live scan reappear on the next scan. This cannot be undone.
benchmark.clearSeenDesc: This permanently deletes the logged history of avatars you've seen. This cannot be undone.

fbt.title: FBT Calibration Monitor
fbt.desc: Monitors VRChat tracker OSC data for position drift. When drift exceeds thresholds, sends a chatbox reminder to recalibrate.
fbt.notMonitoring: Start monitoring to see tracker data. Make sure OSC is enabled in VRChat.

rules.title: Automation Rules
rules.empty: No rules yet. Create one to automate VRChat actions.
rules.yamlPlaceholder:
trigger: friend.online
condition: user.displayName contains 'Natsumi'
action:
  type: vrcsm.notification.show
  title: Friend online!
  message: '{{user.displayName}} is online'
